description:
Implement React.lazy() + Suspense per top-level route. Configure Webpack/Vite to emit separate chunks for dashboard, settings, reports, and other major views. Load only what the current route needs.

**Rationale:** Initial bundle likely contains all routes but users visit 1-2 per session. Splitting reduces initial JS payload 40-60%, improving FCP and TTI.
title: Route-based code splitting with dynamic imports
